_doc: Golden test vectors for the SCHEMAS.md §7 normalization grammar. This file is the CANONICAL copy (SCHEMAS §7: reduce/test/normalize.vectors.json). Every implementation — reduce/src/normalize.js, scraper normalize/text.ts, and app/src/matching/normalize.ts (the future reference impl) — must produce byte-identical output for every case. Change vectors only alongside a SCHEMAS.md §7 change.
rules: lowercase → NFKD unicode fold, combining marks stripped
all other punctuation → space, EXCEPT '.' between two digits (decimals survive: 10.8, 4.99)

size canonicalization joins a pure-number token to a following unit token: canonical suffixes oz, floz (from 'fl oz'), lb, l, ml, g, kg, ct, pk; word forms (ounces, pounds, liters, grams, count, pack) map to the canonical suffix; already-joined forms (10.8oz, 18ounces) are canonicalized in place

brand tokens first: brands are normalized through the same grammar, matched as a contiguous token subsequence; the FIRST brand in the provided dictionary order that matches is moved to the front (no-op if already at front); at most one brand moves
truncate to ≤ 80 chars at a token boundary (drop the token that would overflow); if the very first token exceeds 80 chars, hard-cut it at 80

cases.name: multiword brand moved to front
cases.input: honey nut cheerios by General Mills 10.8 oz
cases.expected: general mills honey nut cheerios by 10.8oz

cases.name: brand already at front is no-op
first matching brand in dictionary order wins
truncate at token boundary at exactly 80
cases.input: one two three four five six seven eight nine ten eleven twelve thirteen fourteen fifteen sixteen
cases.expected: one two three four five six seven eight nine ten eleven twelve thirteen fourteen
